questions.q: What is the title of the poem by Pablo Neruda?
opts: Keeping Quiet
Twenty Love Poems and a Song of Despair
Sonnet XVIII

questions.q: What is the speaker's initial reaction to the declaration of war?

questions.q: What does the speaker hope to achieve by being quiet?
opts: He wants to be heard
He wants to be seen
He wants to be noticed
He wants to be quiet

questions.q: What is the significance of the phrase 'the clocks stop'?
opts: It means time stands still
It means time moves faster
It means time is irrelevant
It means nothing
questions.explanation: The phrase is a metaphor for the speaker's desire to halt the passage of time and be free from the constraints of the world.

questions.q: What is the speaker's attitude towards the noise of the world?

questions.q: What is the significance of the phrase 'the people obeyed him'?
opts: It means the people are following orders

It means nothing
